mapper.sql: id, apply_info_id, name, patent_type, dept_id, year, patentee, app_date, sub_date, sub_time, data_status, sys_no, sub_user_id, sub_user_dept_id, phone, email, is_approved, approved_date, tech_fields, rela_item_name, tech_based, purpose, content, effect, digest, is_registered, apply_code, patent_state, patent_id, file_ids, note, unit_ranking, fauthor_name, fauthor_title, fauthor_type, fauthor_sex, fauthor_edu_level, fauthor_edu_degree, fauthor_code, check_status, in_fauthor_code, creator_name, operate_time, agency_unit, agency_fee_source
mapper.select: select spa.name as name,spa.app_date as appDate,spa.digest as digest, spa.note as note,spa.phone as phone,spa.email as email, cspt.code as "patentType.id",cspt.name as "patentType.name",cspt.name as patentTypeName, fdept.id as "deptId.id",fdept.name as "deptId.name",fdept.name as deptName, suser.id as subUserId,suser.name as subUserName, spaf.code as "agencyFeeSource.id",spaf.name as "agencyFeeSource.name",spaf.name as agencyFeeSourceName, csru.code as "agencyUnit.id",csru.name as "agencyUnit.name",csru.name as agencyUnitName, spa.data_status as dataStatus,spa.app_date as appDate from srm_patent_apply spa left join ct_srm_patent_type cspt on cspt.code=spa.patent_type left join ct_srm_dept fdept on fdept.id=spa.dept_id left join ct_srm_user suser on suser.id=spa.sub_user_id left join ct_srm_patent_agency_fee_source spaf on spaf.code=spa.agency_fee_source left join ct_srm_rely_unit csru on csru.code=spa.agency_unit where spa.id=#{rowId}
mapper.update:
update srm_patent_apply
data_status = #{status},
check_status = #{checkStatus},
sub_date = #{subDate},
sub_user_id = #{subUserId},
where id=#{rowId}
mapper.select:
select spsg.id as rowId,spsg.app_rowId as appRowId,spsg.note as note, csu.name as subUserName, spa.sub_date as subDate , spsg.audit_status as auditStatus,spsg.data_status as dataStatus, spa.name as name,spa.data_status as dataStatus,cspt.name as patentTypeName,fdept.name as deptName from srm_paper_submission_grade spsg left join srm_patent_apply spa on spa.id=spsg.app_rowId left join ct_srm_user csu on csu.id=spa.sub_user_id left join ct_srm_patent_type cspt on cspt.code=spa.patent_type left join ct_srm_dept fdept on fdept.id=spa.dept_id where spsg.expert=#{paperSubmissionExpertAuditDto.userId} and spsg.sys_no=#{paperSubmissionExpertAuditDto.sysNo}
and spa.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{paperSubmissionExpertAuditDto.title}, '%')
